exploration_notes:
Found 11 Java source files under clients/src/main/java/org/apache/kafka/clients/consumer/internals/ (including subdirectories) containing 'Rebalance' in the class name. Their roles in the rebalance protocol:

**Callback Handlers:**
1. **ConsumerRebalanceListenerInvoker** (class) — Encapsulates invocation of ConsumerRebalanceListener callback methods (onPartitionsRevoked/Assigned/Lost) with logging and metrics tracking during consumer group partition reassignment.
